zh.lifeSummary: 當John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester於1399年出生在英國英格蘭爾哈頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Dutton30歲，母親Parnall Petronill De Vernon16歲。他與Lady Margaret Atherton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年在英國英格蘭爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester于1399年出生在英国英格兰爾哈頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Dutton30岁，母亲Parnall Petronill De Vernon16岁。他与Lady Margaret Atherton在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年在英国英格兰爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester was born in 1399, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Dutton, was 30 and his mother, Parnall Petronill De Vernon, was 16. He married Lady Margaret Atherton in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1461, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester est né en 1399, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Dutton, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Parnall Petronill De Vernon, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Atherton à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1461, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chesterが1399年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Duttonは30歳，母Parnall Petronill De Vernonは16歳であった。イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでLady Margaret Athertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester(이)가 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Dutton(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Parnall Petronill De Vernon(은)는 16세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Lady Margaret Atherton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Dutton 12th Lord of Dutton, Mayor Of Chester родился в 1399 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Dutton было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Parnall Petronill De Vernon, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Atherton в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1461 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.
